active_manifests.activated_reason: P01 Team Comms is the sole source-backed acceptance scenario authorized for exact-head review; validator fixtures are not production manifests.
P02 verifies the bounded public-contract fake source and redacted real Tower/frame/Worker/store observer chain without claiming product approval.
P03 defines the sole explicit-headless agent-browser real-local-Chromium procedure and failure-detecting evidence contract without adding a committed browser runner.
P04 defines the deterministic real-path replay, gap, restart, stale-command, and disposable-context laboratory while mapping current product failures to P06-P10.

P06 verifies the runtime-issued durable source epoch, coherent SQLite bootstrap watermark, explicit old-runtime compatibility, monotonic rows 4-11 eligibility, and both owned P02/P04 baseline closures.
